messages.content: hi
Hello! How can I assist you today?

I had made a youtube shorts from Jitendra kumar aka jeetu bhaiya podcast with bharti singh & harsh limbhichiya and transcript is as "Lantrani ka matlab kya hota hai bhai I Think ek word Mein bolenge toh Ki woh jo baatein fenka hota hai na Jaise main 20 parathe Kha leti hu ye AAP lantrani kar rahe Ho khati 19 hai aisa nahi hota Hain ki apn ne kuch kahaniyan hoti hai jo Kahin na kahin sunne mein aati hai aur tum sochte ho ye Kya Jo atpati si lagti hai Ye news ho sakti hai .. saas ko lekar daamad farar.... saas ko lekar Damad farar nai bhai ye galat bol diya hai. Meri mummy bimar hai. Aise kaha hai. Tu apne ghar Mein kyu kahani le rahi hai bhai ye random baat hai koi aur ki bhi to example ho sakti thi na jaise driver ke sath Madam bhag gayi main Papa ke saath chali jaungi Gujarat Mai nahi bolna chah raha tha but unhone pakadkar weird khabron Ki baat hai weird khabar ....meri maa ki taraf dhyan gaya bas... aur unhine pakda ekdum sahi kyunki mai wahi intent kar raha tha...." now make a strong seo youtube shorts title considering youtube algo

Creating a strong SEO-friendly title for a YouTube Shorts video involves including relevant keywords, making it intriguing or catchy to click on, and ensuring it accurately represents the content of the video. Based on the transcript you've provided, which appears to be a humorous and entertaining discussion about exaggeration (lantrani), strange news stories, and a playful miscommunication regarding a mother-in-law, here is a suggested title:

"Jeetu Bhaiya & Bharti's Hilarious Take on Outlandish Stories | Shocking News Gossip Revealed! | Comedy Shorts"

Let's break down why this title could be effective:

1. **Inclusion of Names:** "Jeetu Bhaiya & Bharti" - Including the names of popular figures like Jitendra Kumar and Bharti Singh can draw their fans' attention.

2. **Descriptive Keywords:** "Hilarious Take", "Outlandish Stories", "Shocking News Gossip" - These are search-friendly terms that are likely to be used by users looking for funny content and gossip about strange news.

3. **Content Format Mention:** "Comedy Shorts" - Clearly signifies the type of content (comedy) and the format (shorts), which is important for YouTube's algorithm.

4. **Engagement and Curiosity:** "Revealed!" - This word suggests that something surprising will be disclosed in the video, making viewers curious to watch.

Remember, the YouTube algorithm also takes into account the video's content, viewer engagement (likes, comments, shares), and watch time, so the title alone won't guarantee success. It helps to use tags and a description that further elaborate on the video's content and include more relevant keywords.

"Bharti's Saas-Damad Roast Fest with Jeetu's Lantrani Twist | Laugh Riot Short"
description

Embark on a laughter-packed rollercoaster with Bharti Singh as she hilariously roasts Harsh Limbachiyaa over a wild 'Saas-Damad' scandal! Join Jitendra Kumar, aka Jeetu Bhaiya, as he brings his own twist of lantrani – tossing humor grenades with witty banter. This Comedy Short is a must-watch mishmash of comedy, unexpected turns, and lighthearted satire. Perfect for a quick pick-me-up or your daily dose of smiles. Hit play for your front-row seat to the wackiest news roast – where no exaggeration is too big and no news too bizarre! #ComedyShort #BhartiRoastsHarsh #JeetuLantrani #SaasDamadDrama #LaughOutLoud

Remember to keep your video description true to the content and check YouTube's guidelines for acceptable content and practices when crafting your descriptions and titles.
use # to make it SEO strong

Crafting an SEO-strong description for YouTube involves using relevant hashtags, descriptive language, and incorporating keywords that your target audience might use to search for content like yours. Here's a revised description using hashtags effectively:

Dive into an uproarious world of comedy with the one and only Bharti Singh as she playfully roasts Harsh Limbachiyaa in a tale of runaway in-laws! Watch Jitendra Kumar, affectionately known as Jeetu Bhaiya, add his signature "lantrani" flavor, weaving a narrative so funny it's borderline unbelievable. This comedy short will whisk you away on a whirlwind of chuckles with its blend of jest, jesting jibes, and irreverent spoofs. Whether you're here for the punchlines or the plot twists, press play and get ready to giggle along with the quirkiest news takes you’ve ever heard! 

#BhartiVsHarsh #JeetuComedyShorts #SaasDamadSaga #RoastRumble #LantraniLaughs #FunnyNewsTwist #ComedyGold #ShortsSensation #MustWatchComedy #ViralLaughs

Using hashtags at the end of the description helps maintain readability, and also ensures YouTube's algorithm picks up on the key themes for better content categorization and discoverability. Keep your hashtags relevant and try not to use too many; a handful of well-chosen hashtags is usually more effective than a long list.

in youtube tags are separated by comma

That's correct. On YouTube, when you're adding tags to your video, you should separate them with commas. Tags are essential as they help YouTube's algorithm understand what your content is about and serve it to the right audience.

Here's how you might structure your tags for the video we've been discussing, using a comma-separated format:

Bharti Singh, Harsh Limbachiyaa, Jitendra Kumar, Jeetu Bhaiya, comedy shorts, hilarious skit, Indian comedy video, laugh riot, trending comedy clips, saas damad joke, comedy central, viral comedy short, lantrani meaning, satirical news comedy, roast comedy short, Bollywood celebrities roast, family comedy skit, humorous fiction, exaggeration humor, desi comedy clip

When users search for topics related to any of these tags, your video has a better chance of appearing in their search results or suggested video feeds. Remember to prioritize relevance and accuracy when selecting tags, as misleading tags can negatively affect your video's performance.
